name: PyPI
description: PyPI — Python Package Index; the official repository for distributing and installing Python packages via pip.

seo.title: PyPI — CI/CD for Applications
seo.meta_description: PyPI: PyPI — Python Package Index; the official repository for distributing and installing Python packages via pip.

when_to_use: Publish Python packages to the official package index
Automated twine upload in CI release pipelines
Private index mirroring for enterprise Python environments
Dependency resolution and package discovery for pip

pros: Canonical registry for all Python packages
Trusted publishing via OIDC is a real win
cons: Supply-chain attacks on popular names persist
Sdist vs wheel mismatches still confuse users
No private registry, must self-host or pay vendor
Deleted releases can cause dependency breakage
review.verdict: The default Python registry — use trusted publishing and pin hashes to keep it safe.
review.best_for: Any Python library or CLI being distributed publicly.
review.not_for: Closed-source or regulated code — use a private index.
